title: cordia myxa
intro: Cordia myxa, also known as the Bead Tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cordia myxa include reducing stress, improving respiratory health, and providing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of Cordia myxa are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
